name: Drata
description: Drata is a security and compliance automation platform that continuously monitors your tech stack against SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, GDPR, and more. It competes directly with Vanta and is known for its clean UX and strong customer support.
use_cases: You need SOC 2 or ISO 27001 certification and want continuous automated evidence collection rather than a manual audit scramble
Your engineering team is stretched and you need compliance monitoring that runs without dedicated compliance headcount
You're closing enterprise deals where security questionnaires and audit reports are a recurring blocker
You want a cleaner, faster onboarding experience than Vanta with equally strong customer support
